title: a bit Smaller Crosshair
description: Makes the Minecraft Crosshair 0.5 pixel smaller.
body:
If you think the Smaller Crosshair Texturepack makes the crosshair too small, this Texturepack is the right choice! It makes the Crosshair 0,5 pixel smaller and is good if you want to change the size of the crosshair, without changing the GUI Scale.
(works with Crosshair Indicator)
